=== info 1981-11-14.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
MUNICIPAL AUDITORIUM
NASHVILLE, TENNESSEE
NOVEMBER 14, 1981

124 audience recording    LB-3121

Gotta Serve Somebody
I Believe In You
Like A Rolling Stone
The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
Man Gave Names To All The Animals
Maggie's Farm
Girl Of The North Country
Ballad Of A Thin Man
Simple Twist Of Fate
Heart Of Mine
All Along The Watchtower
I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
Forever Young
Gamblin' Man (?Trad)
The Times They Are A-Changin'
A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
Watered-Down Love
Shot Of Love
Just Like A Woman
Solid Rock
Masters Of War
When You Gonna Wake Up ?
In The Garden
          *
Blowin' In The Wind
It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
It Ain't Me, Babe
Knockin' On Heaven's Door

Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Fred Tackett (guitar), Steve Ripley (guitar), Al Kooper (keyboards), Tim Drummond (bass), Jim Keltner (drums), Arthur Rosato (drums), Clydie King, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (background vocals).
12 Bob Dylan & Clydie King (shared vocal).
13, 15, 26, 27 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
14 Clydie King, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (vocals).
25, 26 Bob Dylan solo (vocal & guitar).
